prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate intake with proper timing around a 2-hour morning run, maintain hydration and electrolyte balance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals and snacks for one full day with specific timing around the 2-hour morning training session
Total daily carbohydrate intake supports high-endurance training (approximately 8-10g per kg body weight)
Includes pre-run, during-run, and post-run nutrition with appropriate timing and composition
Incorporates hydration and electrolyte strategies throughout the day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions, including hydration and electrolyte considerations
